headline: Fortuna Mining's H1 Gold-Equivalent Production Hits 145,089 Ounces
summary: FSM's H1 output reaches 145,089 GEO, surpassing half of its 2026 guidance as steady Q2 production keeps the miner on track for its 2026 target.

raw.headline: Fortuna Mining's H1 Gold-Equivalent Production Hits 145,089 Ounces
raw.summary: FSM's H1 output reaches 145,089 GEO, surpassing half of its 2026 guidance as steady Q2 production keeps the miner on track for its 2026 target.

headline: DD Enhances WAVE PRO With Integrated Water Treatment Design Platform
summary: DuPont upgrades WAVE PRO to unite four water-treatment technologies, boosting system accuracy, efficiency and flexibility for complex projects.

headline: ‘Staggering’: Goldman Sachs Says China’s Oil Demand May Never Fully Recover
summary: Goldman Sachs is warning that a collapse in Chinese oil demand may be only partly reversible, and the reason has less to do with the Strait of Hormuz than with what Chinese drivers and truckers are quietly doing right now.

raw.headline: ‘Staggering’: Goldman Sachs Says China’s Oil Demand May Never Fully Recover
raw.summary: Goldman Sachs is warning that a collapse in Chinese oil demand may be only partly reversible, and the reason has less to do with the Strait of Hormuz than with what Chinese drivers and truckers are quietly doing right now.

headline: Albemarle and Cars.com have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: ALB earned Bull of the Day after a major earnings beat and rising estimates, while Cars.com landed Bear of the Day on weak traffic and falling forecasts.
